ABOUT_ME.DESCRIPTION_1: I am Leonardo Hernández, a Computer Engineer with nearly 9 years of experience as a Full Stack Developer. Although I have backend experience with technologies such as Node.js, Nest.js and Laravel, my main strength is Frontend using Angular and Next.js, and Mobile development with Ionic, Capacitor and Flutter.
ABOUT_ME.DESCRIPTION_2: I have experience using IONIC for developing mobile applications for iOS and Android. I have built more than 20 applications on that platform, and the performance has been incredible. Additionally, personal projects that have reached over 20 and 40 thousand downloads on Google Play and App Store—finance and entertainment applications in Venezuela—currently in operation.
ABOUT_ME.DESCRIPTION_3: I am the type of person who likes to be very responsible in the activities I carry out and, above all, to make good use of time, thanks to tools that help me manage it better, such as Google Calendar, Notion, Trello, etc. I always like to stay in constant communication with my team, especially when any of my colleagues need help; likewise, if I cannot resolve any of my tasks and get stuck, I would like them to help me move forward as a great team.
ABOUT_ME.HIGH_SCHOOL: Nuestra Señora de Lourdes - High School
ABOUT_ME.HIGH_SCHOOL_DESC: The 'Nuestra Señora de Lourdes' Educational Unit is constituted by different facilities, built in order to provide adequate teaching and preparation both educational, moral and civic; so that Lourdes students receive learning about different areas and can employ their acquired knowledge.
ABOUT_ME.UNIVERSITY: Universidad Nacional Experimental de Guayana - University
ABOUT_ME.UNIVERSITY_DESC: Venezuelan University, born on March 18, 1938, educator, forger of organization and development in Higher Education; founded on March 9, 1982 by presidential decree No. 1,432 of President Luis Herrera Campins.

EXPERIENCE.TITLE: Experience
EXPERIENCE.JOB_1_TITLE: Full-Stack Engineer (focus on AI App Development) - GREYDATA CONSULTING
EXPERIENCE.JOB_1_DESC: Participation in the development of ROSC AI project, a mobile application in charge of transcribing voices to text, generating medical consultation reports for doctors in Canada, implementing ChatGPT API to ensure the accuracy of the report and save time to the client. Products: ROSC.ai
EXPERIENCE.JOB_2_DESC: Development of a web app that allows creating, administering, and exporting Simulation Raw Files for use on Flex Term Software. The app manages login, auth, cookie management and API Rest consulting, made with Angular. Products: ROSIE, FALCON, GSTAX.
EXPERIENCE.JOB_3_DESC: Development on web3 products, NFTs marketplace, wallet management, sign messages on Metamask, Nest.js API Rest on Backend Side and mobile development using Ionic, Cordova and Angular. Products: Metacademy, Peregrine, LastKnown, NFKeys, FoundrySwap.
EXPERIENCE.JOB_4_DESC: Development on mobile app products available for Android & iOS, with API Rest consulting, login, storage use, native functions with Cordova plugins. Products: Beth App, PACO, Reune Clientes, Legacy, KEF, Shezy.
EXPERIENCE.JOB_5_DESC: Participation in currency exchange project based on Angular. Use of Rest API, Validations and advanced forms. Freelance modality.
EXPERIENCE.JOB_6_DESC: Participation in FHIA project based on Quasar + Vue. Use of Rest API, layout and use of indexed DB. Freelance modality.
EXPERIENCE.JOB_7_DESC: Participation in Ecommerce project based on Angular, applying the use of Material Angular for its visual. Rest API consumption and administrative module development. Remote modality.
EXPERIENCE.JOB_8_DESC: Internship, development of two web systems based on Laravel and Angular 6. Inventory system of the editorial production department and image bank of the graphic design department. In-person modality.
EXPERIENCE.JOB_9_DESC: Writing lessons regarding music production using FL Studio software. Remote modality.
EXPERIENCE.JOB_10_DESC: Graphic design, flyers for events, covers for music artists and advertising material. Freelance modality.
